associatedMedia.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief於1432年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean38歲，母親Jonata Stewart Lady Duart30歲。他於1454年與Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief于1432年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素时，他的父亲Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean38岁，母亲Jonata Stewart Lady Duart30岁。他于1454年与Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年在苏格兰艾丁波享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

nameMeanings.name: Og
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief was born in 1432, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, was 38 and his mother, Jonata Stewart Lady Duart, was 30. He married Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose in 1454, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1484, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief est né en 1432, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jonata Stewart Lady Duart, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose en 1454, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1484, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.-Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Scotland: Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief 1432 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean 38 und seine Mutter Jonata Stewart Lady Duart 30. Er hat 1454 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1484 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief è nato il nel 1432 nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Jonata Stewart Lady Duart, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose nel 1454, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1484, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chiefが1432年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLeanは38歳，母Jonata Stewart Lady Duartは30歳であった。1454年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでLady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montroseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年にスコットランドエディンブルグで52歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.-Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief(이)가 1432년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonata Stewart Lady Duart(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1454년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief nasceu em 1432, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jonata Stewart Lady Duart, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose em 1454, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1484, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.-Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Scotland: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief родился в 1432 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonata Stewart Lady Duart, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose в 1454 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1484 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1484, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
